title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Notion Templates for Crypto — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: In Nigeria, where PayPal is banned, many Notion template creators are blocked from selling their digital products. This guide shows you how to overcome these restrictions and start selling Notion templates for crypto using the Core Shop Engine, a powerful backend solution that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts without requiring a payment processor account. We'll cover the technology behind it, who it's built for, and provide a step-by-step checklist to get you started. By the end of this guide, you'll know exactly how to monetize your Notion templates using cryptocurrency, even in restricted countries like Nigeria.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

The Core Shop Engine is a full backend solution that enables you to sell digital products, including Notion templates, without relying on payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. This is crucial for creators in restricted countries who can't access these services. By using the Core Shop Engine, you can automate delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easy to sell your Notion templates to customers worldwide.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Under the hood, the Core Shop Engine uses a bot engine to automate delivery and payment verification. When a customer purchases a Notion template, the bot engine instantly delivers the template and generates a PDF receipt. This process happens seamlessly, without requiring any manual intervention. The Core Shop Engine also integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ cryptocurrencies, ensuring that your customers can pay with their preferred cryptocurrency.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is built for digital creators who want to sell their products, including Notion templates, without relying on payment processors. This includes creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya, who can't access PayPal or Stripe. Whether you're a solo entrepreneur or a small business owner, the Core Shop Engine provides a powerful solution to monetize your digital products and reach customers worldwide.
The Core Shop Engine automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipt generation, making it easy to sell digital products without manual intervention.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine consists of three main components: the backend solution, the NOWPayments payment processor, and the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration. Together, these components enable seamless payment processing, automated delivery, and PDF receipt generation. With the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration, you can also create a user-friendly shopping experience for your customers, making it easy to purchase and download your Notion templates.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with the Core Shop Engine, you can visit the demo shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. From there, you can explore the features and functionality of the Core Shop Engine and learn how to integrate it with your existing Notion template store. By following the step-by-step checklist below, you'll be able to set up your Core Shop Engine instance, configure your payment processor, and start selling your Notion templates to customers worldwide.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
By using the Core Shop Engine, you can reach customers worldwide, even in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for ways to sell digital downloads without fees, you might also be interested in using the Core Shop Engine, which integrates with NOWPayments to support 300+ cryptocurrencies. You can also explore other digital download store options, such as Sellfy or Ecwid, but be aware that these platforms may charge fees or have restrictions in place. With the Core Shop Engine, you can sell your Notion templates, ebooks, and other digital products without relying on payment processors like PayPal or Stripe.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with the Core Shop Engine, follow these steps: Set up your Core Shop Engine instance at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Configure your payment processor, NOWPayments, to support your preferred cryptocurrency. Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend to create a user-friendly shopping experience. Upload your Notion templates to the Core Shop Engine and set a price. Share your shop with customers and start selling your Notion templates.
The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports 300+ cryptocurrencies, ensuring that your customers can pay with their preferred cryptocurrency.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
